name: create_engagement
description: Log an engagement (note, email, call, or meeting) associated with a contact, company, or deal.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: Engagement properties including body and timestamp.

example.hs_note_body: Had a productive call about the enterprise deal.

parameters.name: associations
parameters.description: Associations to contacts, companies, or deals.

properties.hs_note_body: Had a productive call about the enterprise deal.
Had a productive call about the enterprise deal.
